opportunities.title: Sports Events Coordinator
opportunities.description:
This is a remote position.

We are seeking an organized and proactive Remote Sports Events Coordinator to join our team. In this role, you will assist with the planning, coordination, and execution of sports-related events and campaigns. You will communicate with vendors, clients, and internal teams to ensure smooth event operations. This position is ideal for someone who enjoys working remotely, has strong organizational skills, and thrives in a fast-paced environment.

opportunities.description:
[HIRING] Graphic Designer for Vintage Bootleg / Big Face T-Shirt Designs ($75-$150+ Per Design)

I’m looking for a graphic designer with experience creating vintage-inspired bootleg t-shirt graphics for a new apparel project. The style I’m looking for includes: • Large portrait “big face” graphics • Vintage distressed and washed print effects • 90s rap, R&B, and streetwear-inspired aesthetics • Tour-style and bootleg-inspired layouts • Strong photo manipulation and compositing skills • Authentic vintage tee design techniques I’m specifically looking for someone who has created similar work
